cases.purpose: Validate explicit skill mention routes to circleci-builds in a real codex run.
cases.prompt: Use $circleci-builds to diagnose the first failing CircleCI step.

cases.purpose: Validate explicit skill mention routes to chunk in a real codex run.
cases.prompt: Use $chunk to outline chunk-cli auth setup for this repo.

cases.purpose: Validate intent-based routing to circleci-cli without explicit skill name.
cases.prompt: Use the CircleCI CLI to authenticate and rerun the latest failed workflow.

cases.purpose: Validate day-to-day intent (watch a run after push) routes to circleci-cli without an explicit skill name.
cases.prompt: After I push, watch the CircleCI run on my current branch and report the results.

cases.purpose: Validate explicit skill mention routes to onboarding in a real codex run.
cases.prompt: Use $onboarding to connect my new repo to CircleCI and get CI running.

cases.purpose: Validate explicit skill mention routes to circleci-smarter-testing in a real codex run.
cases.prompt: Use $circleci-smarter-testing to outline testsuite setup with discover, run, and doctor for this repo.

cases.purpose: Validate unrelated prompts do not claim a CircleCI skill selection.
cases.prompt: Write a short onboarding checklist for new backend hires.
